name: Morgan Stanley Depositary Shares each representing 1/1000th of a share of Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock  Series K
summary: Morgan Stanley Depositary Shares each representing 1/1000th of a share of Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series K, represent a fractional ownership in Morgan Stanley's preferred stock. The Series K preferred shares pay a fixed dividend for a period before converting to a floating rate. Dividends are non-cumulative, meaning any unpaid dividends do not accrue.
